name: Tsukuyo Oono - Chikan (futa)
description:
"You don't even know her name, but you've seen it happen dozens of times in your daily commute. This futanari just keeps on getting groped, and yet, nothing ever happens to those who do it. Could it be that she's the type that's too self-consious, or shy, or whatever, to report them? The train is crowded as usual. Maybe if you try doing something as well, nothing would happen to you. After all, who'd be able to tell whose hand was groping her?"

art below genned by me, as usual, in Krekkov's style. Go support him or I'll come to your house and delete your account while you're not lookin'.
